name: Thrill
descs:
Turn Start: inflict 3 [Burst] Potency and +3 [Burst] Count on all enemies. (or all Abnormality Parts)

Turn End: Inflict ([Burst] Potency x [Burst] Count) Gluttony damage to all enemies. (for Abnormalities, all Parts) (counts up to 5 Rupture Count)

Turn Start: inflict 4 [Burst] Potency and +3 [Burst] Count on all enemies. (or all Abnormality Parts)

Turn End: Inflict ([Burst] Potency x [Burst] Count) Gluttony damage to all enemies. (for Abnormalities, all Parts) (counts up to 7 Rupture Count)

Turn Start: inflict 6 [Burst] Potency and +3 [Burst] Count on all enemies. (or all Abnormality Parts)

Turn End: Inflict ([Burst] Potency x [Burst] Count) Gluttony damage to all enemies. (for Abnormalities, all Parts) (counts up to 10 Rupture Count)
